source_section.title_label_raw: Site Design Requirements Design Requirement: Outdoor Amenity Space

sections.title_label_raw: Requirements Design Requirement: Outdoor Amenity Space

provisions.heading_context_raw: Requirements Design Requirement: Outdoor Amenity Space
provisions.text: This Section applies where outdoor amenity space is:

provisions.heading_context_raw: Requirements Design Requirement: Outdoor Amenity Space
provisions.text: provided either at-grade or on a rooftop;

provisions.heading_context_raw: Requirements Design Requirement: Outdoor Amenity Space
provisions.text: required by Section 67 or Section 68; and

provisions.heading_context_raw: Requirements Design Requirement: Outdoor Amenity Space
provisions.text: equal to or greater than 30.0 square metres in size.

provisions.heading_context_raw: Requirements Design Requirement: Outdoor Amenity Space
provisions.text: Outdoor amenity space shall:

provisions.heading_context_raw: Requirements Design Requirement: Outdoor Amenity Space
provisions.text: include all of the following elements:

provisions.heading_context_raw: Requirements Design Requirement: Outdoor Amenity Space
provisions.text: unobstructed access,

provisions.heading_context_raw: Requirements Design Requirement: Outdoor Amenity Space
provisions.text: permanent seating, and

provisions.heading_context_raw: Requirements Design Requirement: Outdoor Amenity Space
provisions.text: general lighting, as per the requirements of Section 372; and

provisions.heading_context_raw: Requirements Design Requirement: Outdoor Amenity Space
provisions.text: offer weather protection to its users, by providing a minimum of one of the following methods (Diagram 10):

provisions.heading_context_raw: Requirements Design Requirement: Outdoor Amenity Space
provisions.text: within the outdoor amenity space, a new deciduous tree that is not a shrub or the retention of an existing deciduous tree that is not a shrub with a minimum base caliper of 100 millimetres,

provisions.heading_context_raw: Requirements Design Requirement: Outdoor Amenity Space
provisions.text: within the outdoor amenity space, structures such as gazebos, pergolas, or covered site furnishings,

provisions.heading_context_raw: Requirements Design Requirement: Outdoor Amenity Space
provisions.text: canopies or awnings on facades that abut the outdoor amenity space,

provisions.heading_context_raw: Requirements Design Requirement: Outdoor Amenity Space
provisions.text: a recessed entrance or facade that abuts the outdoor amenity space, or

provisions.heading_context_raw: Requirements Design Requirement: Outdoor Amenity Space
provisions.text: a cantilever over an entrance of a main building that abuts the outdoor amenity space.

provisions.heading_context_raw: Requirements Design Requirement: Outdoor Amenity Space
provisions.text: Subject to Subsection 356(4), in addition to the requirements of Subsection 356(2), outdoor amenity space shall provide a minimum of one of the following materials for groundcover:

provisions.heading_context_raw: Requirements Design Requirement: Outdoor Amenity Space
provisions.text: vegetation;

provisions.heading_context_raw: Requirements Design Requirement: Outdoor Amenity Space
provisions.text: brick pavers;

provisions.heading_context_raw: Requirements Design Requirement: Outdoor Amenity Space
provisions.text: stone pavers;

provisions.heading_context_raw: Requirements Design Requirement: Outdoor Amenity Space
provisions.text: concrete pavers; or

provisions.heading_context_raw: Requirements Design Requirement: Outdoor Amenity Space
provisions.text: wood, excluding composites.

provisions.heading_context_raw: Requirements Design Requirement: Outdoor Amenity Space
provisions.text: Subsection 356(3) shall not apply to swimming pools, sports courts, or playgrounds. Diagram 10: Weather protection for outdoor amenity space, per Clause 356(2)(b) Design Requirement: Walkways for Cluster Housing Uses

sections.title_label_raw: Cluster housing dwelling units shall be connected to any streetline,

provisions.heading_context_raw: Cluster housing dwelling units shall be connected to any streetline,
provisions.text: Cluster housing dwelling units shall be connected to any streetline, any applicable amenity space, and any accessory parking lot by walkways. Design Requirement: Privacy for Grade-Related Dwelling Units

sections.title_label_raw: Where grade-related dwelling units are provided, the space located

provisions.heading_context_raw: Where grade-related dwelling units are provided, the space located
provisions.text: Where grade-related dwelling units are provided, the space located between each grade-related dwelling unit and the streetline shall include one of the following methods for privacy (Diagram11):

provisions.heading_context_raw: Where grade-related dwelling units are provided, the space located
provisions.text: the planting of a deciduous tree, that is not a shrub, with a minimum base caliper of 50 millimetres;

provisions.heading_context_raw: Where grade-related dwelling units are provided, the space located
provisions.text: the planting of a minimum of two shrubs, each no less than 1.0 metre in height;

provisions.heading_context_raw: Where grade-related dwelling units are provided, the space located
provisions.text: the installation of a planter ranging in height from 0.25 to 1.0 metre; or

provisions.heading_context_raw: Where grade-related dwelling units are provided, the space located
provisions.text: the installation of a masonry wall ranging in height from 0.25 to 1.0 metre. Diagram 11: Methods for providing privacy to grade-related dwelling units, per Section 358
